objective: Collect Nina after the gala and end the shift cleanly
opposition: Nina is drunk, keeps changing the destination, and treats the car as an extension of her mood
turn: Instead of Belgravia, she orders Beni east toward Hackney Wick
consequence_cost: Beni's overtime becomes private rather than logged company time

objective: Keep the drive controlled while Nina spirals about Jonas
opposition: Nina wants witness without conversation and tests whether Beni will intrude or judge
turn: At Jonas's studio she asks Beni's name and tells dispatch to send only him next time
consequence_cost: Beni loses the protection of anonymity and becomes a reusable tool for Nina

objective: Secure Nina's repeat business
opposition: Nina offers cash work that depends on secrecy outside normal route procedure
turn: She states that she does not want Mercer knowing where she goes
consequence_cost: Beni accepts income that will require future lies

objective: Reduce pressure at home by paying Laci something toward rent
opposition: Laci wants exact money and has no patience for vague promises
turn: Beni can pay only part of what he owes and sees how little margin he has
consequence_cost: His debt remains active and keeps him tied to unstable work

objective: Get through the Ashdown house without being noticed
opposition: Eszter clocks his accent and refuses to let him stay blank in the basement kitchen
turn: She feeds him and jokes in Hungarian until he answers her properly
consequence_cost: The townhouse gains a human point of return for Beni

objective: Complete Bea's school run and survive the waiting hours
opposition: Service work leaves Beni stranded between tasks and unable to leave the neighborhood
turn: Bea asks about driving in a way that shows she actually sees him
consequence_cost: Beni feels observed by someone inside the family, not just used by them

objective: Use lunch break to stay warm and kill time
opposition: Eszter keeps asking real questions instead of allowing polite emptiness
turn: She plays Beni a voice note from Lili and turns the kitchen into shared space
consequence_cost: Beni starts returning to the kitchen because he wants company

objective: Deliver Nina's pills and catalogue before anyone notices the gap in her day
opposition: Jonas is irritated by Nina's dependence and resents Beni's presence
turn: He accepts the items but makes clear Nina is clinging harder than he is
consequence_cost: Beni sees the affair's imbalance from the outside

objective: Exit Jonas's studio without becoming part of the drama
opposition: Jonas needles Beni as if chauffeurs are furniture that can still be humiliated
turn: He asks whether Nina sends all her errands through boys now
consequence_cost: Beni carries away insult along with the errand's completion

objective: Get Nina home and keep Oscar from probing further
opposition: Oscar notices the mileage mismatch and asks mildly precise questions
turn: Beni lies about traffic and a pharmacy stop
consequence_cost: Beni's discretion becomes an active spoken falsehood

objective: Share an ordinary evening with Eszter without ruining it by self-consciousness
opposition: Beni is ashamed of the flat and Laci's resentment hangs over the room
turn: Laci comes home, sees the situation at once, and stays just sober enough to make it awkward
consequence_cost: Beni has to remain present in his own life rather than flee into humor

objective: Walk Eszter downstairs and end the night without asking for too much
opposition: Beni expects the evening to collapse back into caution
turn: Eszter kisses him first on the stairwell landing
consequence_cost: Beni now has something outside work that he can actually lose

objective: Get Nina through the gallery opening and back out after Jonas humiliates her
opposition: Jonas refuses to leave with Nina and the room's social politeness sharpens the insult
turn: Nina cuts the evening short and orders Beni to drive without destination
consequence_cost: His role shifts from chauffeur to private receiver of her humiliation

objective: Get Nina into the house and reestablish professional distance
opposition: Nina turns the parked car and garage into a place where she can still feel chosen
turn: She climbs into the back seat with Beni and he does not stop the encounter
consequence_cost: Beni enters a sexual arrangement that repeats the structure of his past catastrophe

objective: Restore normal work after the garage encounter
opposition: Nina acts as if sex changed nothing except her entitlement to Beni's time
turn: She hands him extra cash with the next list of errands
consequence_cost: Intimacy is recoded as transaction and leverage

objective: Keep Eszter from noticing anything is wrong
opposition: Eszter reads altered body language faster than Beni can invent a convincing mood
turn: She asks where the extra cash came from and he lies lightly
consequence_cost: The first relational crack opens between them

objective: Let another evening with Eszter stay easy and unforced
opposition: Beni wants closeness but keeps editing himself before he speaks
turn: Eszter says she cannot keep guessing which version of him is in the room
consequence_cost: Beni is warned that his detachment has effects, not just causes

objective: Move from talking into sex without disappearing inside panic
opposition: Real intimacy requires Beni to name what he wants and what he can offer
turn: He freezes when Eszter asks a simple direct question about them
consequence_cost: The night ends with connection preserved but conditional

objective: Find out how dangerous the paparazzi image really is
opposition: Oscar's office wants route confirmation and treats the discrepancy as administrative
turn: Nina's car is now part of a story the household cannot fully control
consequence_cost: Beni's earlier informal lies turn into a paper problem

objective: Get advice from Noor without sounding frightened
opposition: Noor recognizes the pattern and does not romanticize what rich clients do to staff
turn: He tells Beni no one protected by money will protect him back
consequence_cost: Beni understands the warning and chooses against it

objective: Close the records gap before Oscar sees more
opposition: Beni has to alter logs in a system designed to catch alterations
turn: He changes the mileage and route sequence by hand
consequence_cost: Beni commits misconduct that can later be proven

objective: Pick Nina up at 3 a.m. and keep the situation from becoming medical or public
opposition: Nina is bleeding from a broken glass and refuses a hospital or home
turn: She orders Beni to keep driving along the river instead of stopping
consequence_cost: Beni is trapped in her crisis with no clean exit

objective: Endure Nina's night-drive confession without being absorbed by it
opposition: Nina turns self-revelation into a test of Beni's silence and loyalty
turn: She tells him he is safest because he never asks for anything
consequence_cost: Beni feels objectified rather than chosen and cannot unknow it

objective: Complete an airport run after a sudden traffic disaster
opposition: A lorry swerves and the near collision detonates Beni's old crash memory
turn: He gets the car onto the hard shoulder but cannot keep driving
consequence_cost: Beni's professional control fails in public and at work

objective: Recover enough to continue the day
opposition: Noor takes over the practical tasks but refuses to let Beni hide behind silence
turn: Beni tells Noor about Klara, the affair, and the fatal Hungarian crash
consequence_cost: His past becomes shared knowledge with present consequences

objective: Spend a day with Eszter that belongs to neither work nor secrecy
opposition: Beni enjoys the market and train ride but knows he is withholding the current truth
turn: Eszter talks openly about Lili and the money London extracts from motherhood
consequence_cost: The emotional stakes of lying to her rise sharply

objective: Build physical intimacy that is mutual rather than purchased
opposition: Beni can tell the truth about Klara but not about Nina
turn: They have sex, then Beni offers the older wound while hiding the fresh one
consequence_cost: The relationship deepens on unstable ground

objective: Understand what the Ashdowns' financial tightening will do to the staff
opposition: Oscar turns household cuts into neutral numbers and reduced hours
turn: Eszter learns she is losing shifts and possibly the live-in room
consequence_cost: Her precarity becomes immediate and measurable

objective: Protect Eszter from the worst of the shortfall
opposition: Nina wants one last set of secret drives and senses exactly what money will buy
turn: She presses cash on Beni while asking for renewed discretion
consequence_cost: Beni links care for Eszter to obedience toward Nina

objective: Use the money to solve a real problem without exposing its source
opposition: Beni offers Eszter help that she both needs and distrusts
turn: She takes some of it because rent does not care about pride
consequence_cost: His betrayal now lives inside an act of support

objective: Limit the fallout from Bea's growing suspicion
opposition: Bea has tracked timings, seen the garage moment, and refuses to be gaslit
turn: She tells Eszter before confronting either parent
consequence_cost: Beni loses control of who knows what

objective: Keep Eszter from leaving him completely
opposition: Eszter is angrier at the lie around the money than at the sex itself
turn: She ends things, returns his key, and shuts him out of the kitchen
consequence_cost: Beni becomes socially homeless inside the one house where he had felt less alone

objective: Decide what to do when Bea arrives at his flat with an overnight bag
opposition: Beni has no legitimate space to shelter a rich minor and no trust in her parents
turn: Bea says she would rather sleep on his floor than stand in the gala photographs
consequence_cost: Beni must choose action over observation

objective: Get Bea somewhere safer than Laci's front room
opposition: Laci wants the problem gone and Beni has no right to ask Eszter for help
turn: Beni takes Bea to Eszter's church-basement room anyway
consequence_cost: He risks a fresh humiliation because Bea's need is more urgent

objective: Convince Eszter to help Bea for one night
opposition: Eszter owes Beni nothing and has every reason to send them away
turn: Bea starts shaking and Eszter switches into maternal command
consequence_cost: Eszter helps the girl, and Beni is forced to face care he did not earn

objective: Get the gala machinery moving on time
opposition: The house is overfull of deliveries, radios, flowers, and class friction
turn: Service corridors reveal how much labor is needed to stage effortless wealth
consequence_cost: Beni sees the side-door world in its fullest form

objective: Decide whether Nina's Paris proposal is escape or another trap
opposition: Poverty makes the apartment, money, and status she offers genuinely tempting
turn: Nina frames Paris as a life where no one will ask questions
consequence_cost: Beni realizes the offer depends on his continued erasure

objective: Hold himself together through the final setup
opposition: Oscar's choreography of arrivals turns family and staff into props
turn: Beni chooses privately not to go with Nina after the gala
consequence_cost: His internal decision raises the cost of the evening to come

objective: Move guests, family, and donor attention through the gala without visible rupture
opposition: The event rewards silence and punishes any disruption
turn: Bea is placed for photographs as if she were floral design rather than a person
consequence_cost: The family's lie becomes intolerable to her

objective: Keep Bea from vanishing into the night when she breaks formation
opposition: Bea refuses the tableau and walks out while the adults scramble to contain optics
turn: Beni follows her long enough to know she is safe with friends
consequence_cost: He gains the opening to decide what to do with the truth

objective: End his participation in the Ashdown lie
opposition: Oscar can still pay, threaten, and replace Beni, and Nina still expects silence
turn: Beni returns the cash and altered logbook and admits his role
consequence_cost: He is fired and stripped of patronage, but the secrecy chain breaks

objective: Start the lower-paid airport-night job and learn the new limits of his life
opposition: The work is rougher, the passengers meaner, and the glamour gone
turn: Beni keeps the shift anyway because surviving honestly now matters more than appearances
consequence_cost: His new life is materially harder and morally less evasive

objective: See whether any contact with Eszter is possible after the rupture
opposition: Eszter does not owe forgiveness and has moved into a smaller, stricter life
turn: They share a meal, plan for Lili's visit, and part without reunion
consequence_cost: Beni leaves with honesty instead of absolution and chooses the main road over the mews
